## Local-first and privacy expectations

How should this feature preserve the project's local-first privacy model?

- [ ] It can work without a cloud account
- [ ] It does not require remote telemetry
- [ ] It does not collect prompts, model responses, source code contents, or secrets by default
- [ ] Any optional data collection is visible and documented

## Alternatives considered

Describe any simpler or narrower alternatives.
